name: BLACK_WALL Preflight Guardrail
description: Pre-action risk check for OpenClaw tool calls. Hooks before_tool_call to call BLACK_WALL forecast(); in enforce mode, blocks STOP verdicts and surfaces CAUTION as approval prompts. Receipts are Ed25519-signed and verifiable offline.

apiKey.description: BLACK_WALL API key (bw_live_… / bw_test_…). Prefer the BLACKWALL_API_KEY env var over config.

baseUrl.description: BLACK_WALL API base URL. Defaults to https://blackwalltier.com.

mode.description: observe = log verdicts but never block; enforce = block STOP, gate CAUTION. Defaults to observe.

cautionAction.description: What a CAUTION verdict does in enforce mode: approve = surface OpenClaw's approval prompt; block = veto; allow = proceed. Defaults to approve.
